eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Bannock; Bear Lake; Benewah; Bingham; Bonneville; Butte; Caribou; Clark; Franklin; Fremont; Jefferson; Madison; Oneida; Power; Teton, ID; at 03:16 PM ON JAN 30, 2026 Effective until 05:16 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is an activation of the Endangered Missing Person Alert system.  The Bingham County Sheriffs Office is looking for Joseph Haight who was last seen at Sage Hill Gas Station Casino near Blackfoot and is believed to be in danger. He is an 18 year old male with green eyes and brown hair and was last seen wearing a black jacket black pants and black boots. Authorities say that the missing person requires daily medication that he does not have with him. If you have any information on the where abouts of this missing person please contact Bingham County dispatch at 2 0 8.  7 8 5 1 2 3 4 or dial 9  1  1 immediately.
